text: Revised Guidelines of IQAC and submission of AQAR
The Annual Quality Assurance Report (AQAR) of the IQAC
All NAAC accredited institutions will submit an annual self-reviewed progress report to NAAC, through
its IQAC. The report is to detail the tangible results achieved in key areas, specifically identified by the
institutional IQAC at the beginning of the academic year. The AQAR will detail the results of the
(Note: The AQAR period would be the Academic Year. For perspective plan worked out by the IQAC.

3.26 Major Activities during the year in the sphere of extension activities and Institutional Social
 On 16 April 2014, NSS volunteers under the leadership of Mr. MahadeoraoBhuibhar,
the Vice- President, Shri. Shivaji Education Society Amravati conducted rally against
Goat Sacrifice Tradition at Saundhala, a village 15 km away from the town. It resulted
that District Collector banned old ridden tradition.
 Under the Special camp run by NSS unit of the college from 19 December 2014 to 26
December 2014 at adopted village Warud BK, activities like Village Cleanliness Drive,
Burning hat Cleanliness Drive, Water Tank, Superstition Eradication Programme,
Personality Development Programmeetc were successfully undertaken.

6.1 State the Vision and Mission of the institution
To use the educational and physical resources available within the institution for the
creation of skilled, disciplined, educated and rational society of high morals standard.
1. To promote the cause of education, to provide facilities for the acquisition of
knowledge and information and the advancement in culture.
2. To enable the rural students to acquire the self-confidence to lead respectable and
3. To undertake and make available facilities for research.
4. To encourage women education by admitting them to various subjects.
5. To encourage for overall physical and cultural development of students fraternity
6. To provide platform to the students by giving them an opportunity to face all the
challenges of the competitive world with utmost utilization of their potential in
sports, athletic, cultural and other events.
7. To organize and run tournaments, competitions, cultural festivals etc.
8. To organize and arrange Seminars, Conferences, Workshops, Poetic Meet, etc.
9. To adopt new technology and methods for effective teaching- learning process and
acquaint the students to recent development in the world.
10. To inculcate social, national and human values in young generation through
education and thereby contribute to the nation building.
The vision and mission of the college is communicated to the students, teachers, staff and other
stakeholders through the college prospectus and the college website. Also the vision and
mission statements are displayed prominently in the college campus.

Feedback Report from Students, Parents, Alumni and Library
The institution formed Feedback Committeefor effective functioning of the college and
improvement in teaching and learning and library services. A four member- committee is
headed by the Principal as the chairperson. Every year the committee prepare a
questionnaire covering all areas of the institution. A group of 20 students of each class is
suggested to fill up the form twice a year. In the meeting of Teacher Parents Association
Revised Guidelines of IQAC and submission of AQAR Page 29
and Alumni, the same form is filled up. The committee aimed at seeking remarks from
stakeholders and fulfill them in order to improve quality in all aspects of the institution.
Following are the suggestions recommended by students, parents and alumni.
 The vacant post of Physical Director needs to be filled.
 Reading room in library need to be developed.
 Classroom should be clean and desk-bench should be arranged systematically.
 Need support to fill up scholarship form online
 More than one book should be issued.
 Counseling Cell should be more helpful in selecting optional subjects.
 Cool Drinking Water Tank need to be increased.
 The post for Librarian should be immediately filled.
 Teacher should teach with the help of dais.
 Girls Common Room needs to be neat and clean.
 Women Hostel should be stared soon.
The feedback committee chaired by the Principal analyzed feedback forms and retrieved
suggestions recommended by students, parents and alumni and presented report.
 With the support of the Parents Management, Mr. Lonkar as physical teacher is tranfered
 Reading room in the central library is accommodated with internet facility.
 New sports materials were purchased on students’ demand.
 A special committee is formed to monitor class room cleanliness.
 A technical expert is temporarily appointed to fill scholarship form online.
 The Counseling Cell is more involved in counseling the selection of optional subjects.
 Three more Drinking Water Cooler added as water facility to learners
 Toilet for boy students has been newly constructed.
 Mr. Wankhade as the librarian has been promoted to the college.
 All the class rooms is facilitated with dais on demand.
 In a week, Girls Class Room is cleaned.
 Efforts is made to Women Hostel next year.
In the way, all the suggestions are fulfilled in the interest of the students
